title: cyathea squamulosa
intro: Cyathea squamulosa, also known as the scaly tree fern, is a species of fern native to New Caledonia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyathea squamulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Cyathea squamulosa is often used in the form of extracts or tinctures, which can be applied topically or used internally to harness its medicinal properties.
